## Description

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 121]
- **App Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
